  // SIGNATURE BOWLS
  { category: "signature-bowls", categoryName: "Signature Bowls", categoryEmoji: "🥣", categoryOrder: 1, hasSalad: true, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "Chicken Salad Bowl", description: "Tender seasoned halal chicken served on a fresh bed of lettuce, tomato, onion, salad mix & tabouli, topped with your choice of sauce.", price: 15, popular: false, available: true, order: 1 },

  { category: "signature-bowls", categoryName: "Signature Bowls", categoryEmoji: "🥣", categoryOrder: 1, hasSalad: true, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "🔥 Special Rice Bowl", description: "Our chef's signature creation — a premium blend of chargrilled meats on saffron-infused rice with fresh salad.", price: 24, popular: false, available: true, order: 10 },

  { category: "kebab-wraps", categoryName: "Kebab Wraps", categoryEmoji: "🌯", categoryOrder: 2, hasSalad: true, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "Original Chicken Wrap", description: "Tender seasoned halal chicken wrapped in freshly baked pita bread, filled with crisp lettuce, tomato, onion & your choice of sauce.", price: 16, popular: false, available: true, order: 1 },

  { category: "hsp", categoryName: "HSP", categoryEmoji: "🍟", categoryOrder: 3, hasSalad: false, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "HSP Small — Chicken", description: "Golden crispy chips layered with tender seasoned chicken, finished with your choice of sauce.", price: 15, popular: false, available: true, order: 1 },

  { category: "hsp", categoryName: "HSP", categoryEmoji: "🍟", categoryOrder: 3, hasSalad: false, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "HSP Medium — Chicken", description: "A generous serve of golden crispy chips piled high with seasoned chicken, smothered in your choice of sauce.", price: 20, popular: false, available: true, order: 4 },
  { category: "hsp", categoryName: "HSP", categoryEmoji: "🍟", categoryOrder: 3, hasSalad: false, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "HSP Medium — Mix 🔥", description: "A generous serve of golden crispy chips loaded with chicken & lamb, smothered in your choice of sauce.", price: 22, popular: true, available: true, order: 5 },
  { category: "hsp", categoryName: "HSP", categoryEmoji: "🍟", categoryOrder: 3, hasSalad: false, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "HSP Large — Chicken", description: "An abundant serve of golden crispy chips generously loaded with seasoned chicken & your choice of sauce.", price: 24, popular: false, available: true, order: 6 },

  { category: "hsp", categoryName: "HSP", categoryEmoji: "🍟", categoryOrder: 3, hasSalad: false, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "HSP X-Large — Mix", description: "Our ultimate halal snack pack — massive golden crispy chips loaded with chicken & lamb. Made to share.", price: 40, popular: false, available: true, order: 8 },
  // SKEWERS & BURGERS
  { category: "skewers-burgers", categoryName: "Skewers & Burgers", categoryEmoji: "🍢", categoryOrder: 4, hasSalad: true, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "Lamb Skewer with Rice", description: "Juicy marinated halal lamb skewer, chargrilled to perfection, served on a bed of lightly saffron-infused rice with your choice of sauce.", price: 27, popular: true, available: true, order: 1 },

  { category: "skewers-burgers", categoryName: "Skewers & Burgers", categoryEmoji: "🍢", categoryOrder: 4, hasSalad: true, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "Lamb Burger — Single", description: "A well-seasoned halal lamb patty, chargrilled and served in a toasted bun with crisp lettuce, fresh tomato, onion & your choice of sauce.", price: 15, popular: false, available: true, order: 3 },
  { category: "skewers-burgers", categoryName: "Skewers & Burgers", categoryEmoji: "🍢", categoryOrder: 4, hasSalad: true, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "Lamb Burger — Double 🔥", description: "Two premium halal lamb patties, chargrilled and stacked high in a toasted bun with crisp lettuce, fresh tomato, onion & your choice of sauce.", price: 19, popular: true, available: true, order: 4 },
  // FALAFEL
  { category: "falafel", categoryName: "Falafel", categoryEmoji: "🧆", categoryOrder: 5, hasSalad: true, hasSauce: true, hasExtras: true, name: "Falafel OG Wrap", description: "Crispy house-made falafel in freshly baked pita bread, filled with crisp lettuce, fresh tomato, onion, salad mix & tabouli, finished with your choice of sauce.", price: 16, popular: false, available: true, order: 1 },
